name: Cafe Mocha Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Mix well until fully combined.
3. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
To serve:
1. In a mug, add 1 to 2 tablespoons of the mix.
2. Pour 3/4 cup boiling water over the mix.
3. Stir until the mix is fully dissolved and combine with the hot water.
